title: The Ghast Engine
description: This texture pack replaces the Happy Ghast with a steampunk-style flying airship.
body:
This texture pack replaces the Happy Ghast with a steampunk-style flying airship (Zeppelin).
It includes animations and interactive details, giving the mob a mechanical and lively appearance.

This pack requires Custom Entity Models (CEM) to work properly — either through a compatible version of Optifine, or by using the ETF (Entity Texture Features) and EMF (Entity Model Features) mods.
